title: Suggest Triage Playbook
desc: Operator playbook for reviewing wkappbot suggestions: classify duplicates, prioritize by impact, keep evidence requirements explicit, and convert repeated insights into skills.
steps: Run suggest list first and treat it as the source of truth for open work.
Classify each item by audience and responsibility: operator, developer, project, or user.
Merge obvious duplicates conceptually before attempting a fix so one root cause does not create multiple partially solved items.
Prioritize by quick win, frequency, and risk; handle the highest signal items first.
Keep resolve evidence explicit and minimal: one test script, one pass condition, one note.
If a suggestion keeps reappearing, convert the recurring lesson into a skill before closing the item.
Prefer a concise triage note over a long analysis: what it is, why it matters, what the next action is.
suggest merge --all-matching 'pattern' --title X --work Nh: bulk-merge matching suggests (non-WKAppBot channels only; --dry-run to preview). Cap=20 items. --dry-run shows matches without writing.
author: claude
